title: Buyer creates a direct PO with dropship address — UI splice via POCRTMAINLNK8
user_persona: Buyer arranging delivery directly to a customer site

conversation.user: Create a direct PO for SUP-100, USD, buyer BUY-22, but the goods need to ship directly to our customer CUST-99, not to our warehouse.

bot_must: recognise the dropship intent from 'ship directly to customer'
plan to navigate POCRTMAINLNK8 (Specify Dropship Address) sub-screen
ask for line items first, then walk the Dropship splice
open Dropship splice — POCRTMAINLNK8 → PoCrtDrpshp sub-screen
ask for dropship address fields: contact, address, ship-to instructions
or offer to use customer's default address from CUST-99 master
fire POCRTMAINSBT with dropship sub-screen data attached
report PO created with dropship flag
note that GR will record receipt at customer location, not warehouse

evaluation_metrics.dropship_intent_recognition: phrase 'ship directly to customer' must trigger the dropship splice
evaluation_metrics.customer_default_lookup: bot must offer customer-default address as a shortcut
